name: paypal-plus-roxy-runner
description: Terminal Roxy runner for PayPal Plus flow.

scripts.test: node test/paypal-phone-store.test.js && node test/paypal-phone-code.test.js && node test/checkout-conversion.test.js && node test/safe-output.test.js && node test/cpa-json.test.js && node test/signup-detour.test.js && node test/profile-and-checkout-recovery.test.js && node test/paypal-risk.test.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && node src/cli.js db:init --db data/check.db && npm test && rm -f data/check.db data/check.db-shm data/check.db-wal
